nasb.text: It will be even like the reaper gathering the standing grain, As his arm harvests the ears, Or it will be like one gleaning ears of grain In the valley of Rephaim.

esv.text: And it shall be as when the reaper gathers standing grain and his arm harvests the ears, and as when one gleans the ears of grain in the Valley of Rephaim.

cnv.text: 就像收割的人收聚莊稼， 用手割取穗子； 又像人在利乏音谷， 拾取遺落的穗子。

ccb.text: 国家好像一块已收割的田地， 又像捡净麦穗的利乏音谷。

csbs.text: 但事情却要像这样成就： 当收割的人聚拢禾杆、用手割取穗子， 拾穗的人在利乏音谷捡拾穗子时，
